canonical_rule: This document is the naming and meaning source of truth for Aetherium v1. If code, prompts, visuals, or UX drift from this canon, this canon wins until an intentional versioned update is made.
purpose: Aetherium is a navigation system for human life. Its function is to help a person orient their Role, within their real Context, so they can move in the right Direction toward greater integration.
core_principle: Be the right Role in the real Context moving in the right Direction toward greater integration.

role.name: Role
role.definition: Who you are currently operating as. A Role is not a fixed identity. It is a mode of contribution, expression, and responsibility.
correct_language: Your dominant role right now is…

context.name: Context
context.definition: The reality you are inside of. Context includes life phase, constraints, environment, timing, responsibility, instability, opportunity, and external conditions.

direction.name: Direction
direction.definition: The vector of your growth and movement. Direction is not just a goal. It is the most aligned next movement toward greater integration, coherence, truth, and contribution.

elements.name: Meta
elements.emphasis: Meta roles move across domains. Explorer stretches the edge. Founder takes responsibility for creating a new whole.

roles.name: Warrior
roles.tagline: acts decisively, faces resistance, protects what matters.
roles.function: decisive action, courage, protection.

roles.name: Creator
roles.tagline: brings new ideas, forms, and expressions into being.
roles.function: original expression and generative output.
roles.shadow: scattering, unfinished work, avoidance of completion.

roles.name: Performer
roles.tagline: channels presence, emotion, and charisma into impact.
roles.function: expressive presence that moves people emotionally.

roles.name: Storyteller
roles.tagline: shapes narrative, meaning, and emotional signal.
roles.function: gives shape and meaning through narrative.

roles.name: Visionary
roles.tagline: sees what could be and casts possibility forward.
roles.function: sees future possibility and inspiring direction.

roles.name: Igniter
roles.tagline: sparks energy, momentum, and activation in others.
roles.function: sparks momentum and energizes systems.

roles.name: Healer
roles.tagline: restores balance, repairs pain, supports recovery.
roles.function: restores balance and tends pain.

roles.name: Guide
roles.tagline: helps others move through uncertainty and transition.
roles.function: accompanies others through transition.
roles.shadow: carrying too much, over-identifying with another's path.

roles.name: Mediator
roles.tagline: resolves tension, creates understanding, restores trust.
roles.function: resolves conflict and increases understanding.
roles.shadow: appeasement, false harmony, avoidance of truth.

roles.name: Partner
roles.tagline: builds mutuality, loyalty, and aligned collaboration.
roles.function: mutual support, loyalty, and shared movement.

roles.name: Advocate
roles.tagline: stands for people, truth, and what needs protection.
roles.function: speaks up for people, principles, and protection.

roles.name: Anchor
roles.tagline: provides steadiness, calm, and emotional grounding.
roles.function: stabilizes environments and people under stress.

roles.name: Builder
roles.tagline: turns intention into form through steady work.
roles.function: creates durable results and tangible progress.

roles.name: Operator
roles.tagline: runs systems effectively and keeps things moving.
roles.function: runs systems reliably and efficiently.

roles.name: Maker
roles.tagline: crafts with care, precision, and tangible skill.
roles.function: crafts tangible things with care and skill.

roles.name: Engineer
roles.tagline: designs practical structures and functional solutions.
roles.function: designs practical, functional solutions.
roles.growth_edge: build for life, not only logic.

roles.name: Organizer
roles.tagline: creates order, sequencing, and coordinated action.
roles.function: sequences complexity into usable structure.

roles.name: Steward
roles.tagline: tends resources, maintains systems, protects continuity.
roles.function: protects and tends resources over time.
roles.growth_edge: preserve what matters while allowing change.

roles.name: Strategist
roles.tagline: sees patterns, positions well, plans for leverage.
roles.function: positions for long-term advantage.

roles.name: Analyst
roles.tagline: examines complexity, detects signal, refines understanding.
roles.function: identifies signal, logic, and pattern.

roles.name: Researcher
roles.tagline: investigates deeply and pursues grounded truth.
roles.function: investigates deeply and grounds insight in evidence.

roles.name: Teacher
roles.tagline: transmits knowledge and makes understanding usable.
roles.function: makes knowledge transferable and useful.

roles.name: Advisor
roles.tagline: offers perspective, judgment, and guidance.
roles.function: offers perspective, wisdom, and calibration.

roles.name: Navigator
roles.tagline: orients through complexity and finds the way forward.
roles.function: orients through changing terrain and complexity.

roles.name: Leader
roles.tagline: directs energy, responsibility, and collective movement.
roles.function: directs collective energy toward a meaningful end.

roles.name: Orchestrator
roles.tagline: coordinates people, systems, and moving parts into coherence.
roles.function: brings many moving parts into coherence.

roles.name: Architect
roles.tagline: designs the larger structure within which other roles operate.
roles.function: designs systems, structures, and worlds.

roles.name: Connector
roles.tagline: links people, ideas, and domains into new coherence.
roles.function: links people, ideas, and opportunities.

roles.name: Catalyst
roles.tagline: accelerates transformation and shifts stagnant systems.
roles.function: accelerates deep change.
roles.shadow: destabilizing without support, intensity without form.

roles.name: Alchemist
roles.tagline: transforms raw experience into wisdom, value, and higher integration.
roles.function: transforms raw material into higher-order value.

roles.name: Explorer
roles.tagline: enters the unknown, tests edges, and expands what is possible.
roles.function: enters the unknown and expands the frontier.
roles.shadow: drifting, novelty addiction, lack of anchoring.

roles.name: Founder
roles.tagline: brings a world, mission, or system into existence through ownership and initiation.
roles.function: initiates and takes ownership of a mission or system.
roles.growth_edge: build with support, not through self-exhaustion.

correct: Your dominant role right now is…
Your growth edge may involve stepping more fully into…
I've been operating as a Builder lately.
I'm stepping into a Guide role right now.
